title: elymus formosanus
intro: Elymus formosanus, also known as the Taiwan wildrye or Formosan wildrye, is a type of grass that is native to Taiwan and is a member of the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Elymus formosanus include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Elymus formosanus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
